mapper.select: SELECT employee_id, name, title, boss_id, boss_role, has_boss, created_at, updated_at FROM employee

SELECT employee.employee_id, employee.name, employee.title, employee.boss_id, boss.boss FROM employee LEFT JOIN boss ON employee.boss_id = boss.boss_id LEFT JOIN employee be ON boss.employee_id = be.employee_id
SELECT employee.employee_id, employee.name, employee.title, boss, employee.boss_id FROM employee LEFT JOIN employee boss ON employee.boss_id = boss.boss_id WHERE employee.employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (name, title, boss_id, boss_role, has_boss, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{title}, #{bossId}, #{bossRole}, #{hasBoss}, NOW(), NOW())
